Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All laboratory values are within normal limits for this 84-year-old male patient. Glycemic control, renal function, electrolytes, lipid profile, and urine microalbumin/creatinine ratio are unremarkable. No evidence of diabetes, renal impairment, electrolyte imbalance, or dyslipidemia. No laboratory abnormalities detected at this time.
